LightningComponentBundle.description: Shared utility service module. Provides pure formatting functions used across MetaMapper LWC components: formatElapsed (elapsed time string from a CreatedDate), truncateAt (word-boundary truncation), truncateApiName (50-char API name truncation with ellipsis), sanitizeFilename (strips filesystem-unsafe characters from an API name), buildDefaultFilename (export filename builder, supports a partial-result suffix), countToBucket (maps a component count to a complexity bucket label), and renderPills (converts Dependency_Context__c JSON into plain-English pill text). No Apex calls, no UI, no state. Import specific named exports only.
